assertions.description: design_analysis.bus_analysis.i2c correctly identifies SCL and SDA nets, both with 10k pull-up resistors (R5 to VCC on SCL, R4 to VCC on SDA), and associates them with U1 (LTC2485).
Both 10k+100nF low-pass filters on IN+ and IN- paths to the LTC2485 are detected with correct 159 Hz cutoff frequency. These are genuine anti-aliasing filters on the ADC inputs.
